quotes: If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.rule_text: If the background must be skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position — keep background-color set to #faa31b, while maintaining the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly.
